message.content:
@startuml
actor SalesClerk
participant "«presentation»\nDefineNewCategoryUI" as UI

SalesClerk -> UI : 1 Define new category\n-- 
activate UI
UI --> SalesClerk : 2 asks user information\n- -  
SalesClerk -> UI : 3 Code, Description\n--   
UI --> SalesClerk : 4 displayCategoryInfo\n--- 

deactivate UI
@enduml
